# Shohrukh Jalolov

> Shohrukh Jalolov is an entrepreneur, business developer, and advisor based in Dushanbe, Tajikistan. He is Business Developer at CifarX, co-founder of the startup Refresh, and an advisor to SoftClub and Webmarker. He is also developing a real estate project in Tajikistan.

## Facts

- Name: Shohrukh Jalolov
- Location: Dushanbe, Tajikistan
- Office: Regus, Buston City
- Email: jalolovshohrukh@gmail.com
- Roles:
  - Business Developer at CifarX (https://cifarx.com)
  - Co-founder of Refresh (https://refresh.tj)
  - Advisor at SoftClub (https://softclub.tj)
  - Advisor at Webmarker (https://webmarker.tj)
  - Founder of a real estate project in Tajikistan
- Education:
  - B.A. in Computer Science and Mathematics, Lewis & Clark College (Portland, Oregon, USA)
  - High school, Dushanbe International School (Dushanbe, Tajikistan)
- Languages: English, Russian, Tajik

## Profiles

- Instagram: https://instagram.com/jalolovshohrukh
- LinkedIn: Shohrukh Jalolov
- Facebook: Shohrukh Jalolov

## Pages

- Home: /en
- About: /en/about
- Work & Ventures: /en/work
- Vision: /en/vision
- Weekly Updates: /en/updates
- Contact: /en/contact

Russian-language versions of every page are available under /ru.

## Summary

Shohrukh Jalolov works at the intersection of business development, startups, and
real estate. He builds and operates companies, advises founders on growth and
go-to-market, and invests in real estate in Tajikistan. He writes weekly public
updates about his work and is focused on helping build the technology ecosystem of
Central Asia.
